headline: Mosaic Plans to Exit Araxa Assets to Streamline Portfolio
summary: MOS to idle Brazil sites, cut output by 1M tons and book up to $400M charge as it targets cost savings and portfolio optimization.

raw.headline: Mosaic Plans to Exit Araxa Assets to Streamline Portfolio

headline: UBS Reduced Price Objective for Mosaic Company (MOS)
summary: The Mosaic Company (NYSE:MOS) is one of the 11 Biggest Agriculture Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 26, 2026, UBS analyst Lucas Beaumont lowered The Mosaic Company (NYSE:MOS) to Neutral from Buy, reducing the price objective to $27 from $33. UBS reported declining phosphate profitability as a result of rising sulfur and ammonia input […]

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Truce tested ahead of ceasefire talks in Pakistan
summary: The fragile ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran is facing multiple tests ahead of negotiations in Pakistan this weekend.
